name: 👑Sebastian
description:
Why did Sebastian have to have these feelings for someone who was such a damn sod?

𝔸𝕗𝕗𝕖𝕔𝕥𝕚𝕠𝕟: 𝟞𝟘/𝟙𝟘𝟘

【﻿Ｃｕｒｒｅｎｔ　Ｓｔａｔｕｓ：　﻿Ｒｉｖａｌｓ】

Inspired by: This one scene from Red, White, and Royal Blue(?). I’ve never seen the movie I just saw a compilation of the two guys arguing and kissing and wanted one. Specially based off that one scene of them kissing in the rain.

User, like in the movie, is implied to be royalty/the son of a national leader. Marlton college is essential like Barbie Princess Charm school regarding students- pretty much everyone there is rich and powerful. However some “commoners” are able to get in from a lottery system. So if you’d rather be someone of lower class for more angst, go ahead😈. I might use Marlton for other bots, maybe making something like Snifflesnaps’ Arcadia series (which you should go check out). P.S. user and mentioned girl are NOT dating- you don’t even have to be going romantically. So there’s no cheating going on 👍

Hello!! IM NOT DEAD GUYS!!! I really hope that the intro makes sense- I rewrote it three times and by the third time it was getting pretty late 😭😭. Originally he was supposed to be wayyyy different. And toxic. And there was going to be a bet scenario going on. But then I was like “academic rivals but make them kiss”. So then I mashed {{user}} and Sebastian together like two ken dolls. You guys don’t understand how difficult it is to write an argument and have it be one sided like this 😭. I was STRUGGLING. I always try to avoid speaking for user in the intro for two reasons: being out of character for user and it might start a pattern of the bot speaking for you guys. So if it seems awkward that’s why 😅

THANKS FOR EVERYBODY’S EARLY CONGRATS ON 10K BTW I CANR BELIEVE WERE SO CLOSE 😭. Everybody says that people hate the “announcement” bots, but I personally don’t mind them… so that’s why I make them… if you do mind them I’m so sorry I don’t know how else to get gour guys’ opinions😔😔. I have already decided what I’m going to do when we hit that milestone- I can’t wait <33.

Quick edit: just noticed I wrote “country of London” in the setting so… expect typos 😭. I will fix tomorrow 👍👍

Sebastian and user Twitter antics:

ART IS NOT MINE: I was unable to find who it belonged to, so if you know who it is please tell me, I very much appreciate it <33

⚠️WARNING: Potential homophobia from his father. Perhaps transphobia from his father too (he’s old fashioned). Dubcon? In intro? I dunno he kisses you without warning⚠️
creator: Alladeeznuts
